article_meta.title: Elections Unsealed Court Docs Show The FBI Probing Possible Election Crimes In Fulton County By: M.D

reasoning: The model correctly flagged several clear author-prose pejoratives and spin without attributing quoted material, but missed multiple obvious biased phrases elsewhere and included at least one questionable Bias by Omission item. Overall moderate failures.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are the author’s own prose; no quoted-source language was treated as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: The ‘Bias by Omission’ about the Election Oversight Group relies on external assumptions and misapplies omission, making it a questionable flag; others are defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple strong author-level biases such as ‘runs cover,’ ‘apologists,’ ‘left-leaning “expert”,’ ‘infiltrating,’ ‘curiously,’ and other loaded framings.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are mostly reasonable (Slant, Subjective Qualifying Adjectives, Word Choice, Spin). The ‘Bias by Omission’ label is misapplied.
